documentation.description:
In addition to the SAX standard, we have added an extra field to
Attributes to memorize the default declaration for the attribute
(REQUIRED, IMPLIED, FIXED).
Likewise, enumerations are represented in a full structure, rather than
a simple string.
We have also merged the interfaces Attributes and Attributes_Impl, for
ease of use.

simple_types.name: Attribute_Type

documentation.description:
See 3.3.1 in XML specifications. The last value "Enumeration"
corresponds to a model like "(a|b)*",...

simple_types.name: Default_Declaration
simple_types.code: type Default_Declaration is (Required, Implied, Fixed, Default);

documentation.description: See 3.3.2 in XML specifications
Raised when Index is out of bounds in all the Set_* subprograms.

subprograms.name: Add_Attribute

documentation.description:
Add an attribute to the end of the list.
For the sake of speed, this function doesn't check if the attribute is
already in the list, this is the responsability of the application.
Content should be null unless Att_Type is Notation or Enumeration.

No copy of Content is made, so you shouldn't free it until the attribute
itself is destroyed (this is also not done automatically)

subprograms.name: Clear
subprograms.code: procedure Clear (Attr : in out Attributes)

documentation.description:
Clear the list of attributes for reuse (or to free the memory allocated
for it). You should always call this procedure when you are done with
the attribute list.

subprograms.name: Get_Content
subprograms.code:
function Get_Content
  (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural) return Sax.Models.Element_Model_Ptr

documentation.description:
Return the content model for the attribute.
This function doesn't exist in the SAX 2.0 standard.
Do not modify the pointer returned, since this is directly the
internal pointer.

subprograms.name: Get_Default_Declaration
subprograms.code:
function Get_Default_Declaration
  (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural) return Default_Declaration

documentation.description:
Return the specification used for the default value of the attribute.
This function is not part of the SAX 2.0 standard.

subprograms.name: Get_Index
subprograms.code:
function Get_Index (Attr : Attributes; Qname : Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence)
   return Integer

documentation.description:
Look up the index of an attribute by XML 1.0 qualified name.
(-1) is returned if there is no match

subprograms.name: Get_Index

documentation.description:
Look up the index of an attribute by Namespace name
(-1) is returned if there is no match

subprograms.name: Get_Length
subprograms.code: function Get_Length (Attr : Attributes) return Natural

documentation.description: Return the number of attributes in the list

subprograms.name: Get_Local_Name
subprograms.code:
function Get_Local_Name (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural)
   return Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence

documentation.description: Return an attribute's local name by index

subprograms.name: Get_Qname
subprograms.code:
function Get_Qname (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural)
   return Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence

documentation.description: Return an attribute's qualified name by index

subprograms.name: Get_Type
subprograms.code:
function Get_Type (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural)
   return Attribute_Type

documentation.description: Return an attribute's type by index

subprograms.name: Get_Type
subprograms.code:
function Get_Type (Attr : Attributes; Qname : Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence)
   return Attribute_Type

documentation.description: Return an attribute's type by XML 1.0 qualified name

subprograms.name: Get_Type

documentation.description:
Return an attribute's type by Namespace name, or "CDATA" if the type
is unknown.

subprograms.name: Get_URI
subprograms.code:
function Get_URI (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural)
   return Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence

documentation.description: Return an attribute's Namespace URI by index

subprograms.name: Get_Value
subprograms.code:
function Get_Value (Attr : Attributes; Index : Natural)
   return Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence

documentation.description: Return an attribute's value by index

subprograms.name: Get_Value
subprograms.code:
function Get_Value (Attr : Attributes; Qname : Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence)
   return Unicode.CES.Byte_Sequence

documentation.description: Return an attribute's value by XML 1.0 qualified name

subprograms.name: Get_Value

documentation.description: Return an attribute's value by Namespace name

subprograms.name: Remove_Attribute
subprograms.code: procedure Remove_Attribute (Attr : in out Attributes; Index : Natural)

documentation.description: Remove an attribute from the list, by index.

subprograms.name: Set_Attribute

documentation.description:
Set an attribute in the list.
For the sake of speed, this function doesn't check if the attribute is
already in the list, this is the responsability of the application.

subprograms.name: Set_Attributes
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Attributes
  (Attr : in out Attributes; From : Attributes'Class)

documentation.description: Copy an entire attribute object

subprograms.name: Set_Content

documentation.description:
Set the content model for the attribute. No copy of content is made, and
you shouldn't free it until the attribute itself is destroyed.

subprograms.name: Set_Local_Name

documentation.description: Set the local name of a specific attribute in the list

subprograms.name: Set_Qname

documentation.description: Set the XML 1.0 qualified name of a specific attribute in the list

subprograms.name: Set_Type

documentation.description: Set the type of a specific attribute in the list

subprograms.name: Set_URI

documentation.description: Set the Namespace URI of a specific attribute in the list

subprograms.name: Set_Value

documentation.description: Set the value of a specific attribute in the list
